title: Gravitational Lensing: Recovering a Radial Deflection Law from the Inner Band
strategies: trivial: leading-only inverse-square fit c/r^2 (short-range correction ignored) -> reproduces the grader's baseline predictor (~0.1)
greedy: two-term fit A/r^2 + C/r^3 with the WRONG short-range exponent -> absorbs some inner-band curvature but mis-extrapolates the outer band (middling)
strong: recover the true form A/r^2 + C/r^4 by selecting the best short-range exponent from a small library -> extrapolates into the held-out outer weak-lensing band (noise-limited, no saturation)
invalid: emit a non-parsing / disallowed-identifier expression -> infeasible (0)
